titleStmt.title: SII 28.113: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 113. (A.R. No. 268 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, east wall, left of entrance.

Records that Tiraimūr-uḍaiyān Pāṇāmaṉ Śrikaṇṭha-dēvaṉ of Tiraimūr in Tiraimūr-naḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu set up a flower garden (tirunanda-vanam) called Śrī-Kaṇṭha-dēvaṉ, to be held as the land of uḍaiyār Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār and also gifted 10 mā, one mundirigai and kīḻ- 7(1/2) mā as tirunandavanappuṟam, apparently for the upkeep of the garden and as the maintenance of four persons headed by Cheḍiyaṉ Uyyakkoṇḍāṉ Śri-kaṇṭhadēvaṉ, appointed as kuḍis to tend the garden. Their remuneration, per day was fixed. The land was in six plots which had been purchased from six persons, four of whom were brahmins who held the brahmin's lands. These plots are stated to have been freed from taxes (iṟai-iḻichchi). The land for the garden itself seems to have been purchased from the sabhā of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēṟkāl-nāḍu in Vaḍakarai-Virudharāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu. The head of the kuḍis aforesaid was however asked to pay 1/2 of the due antarāyam (variśai-ppaḍi-antarāyam) and ensure that there was no complaint, regarding his functioning as (kuḍi kkuṟṟa-ppaḍāmal) and contribute for the ceremonial flower offering (tirumantra-pushpam) for uḍaiyār Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .... pūmātu puṇarappuvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat taṉ tiruppatumalar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉṉiya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭicūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaicoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkaliyakala meyaṟan=taḻaippa kaliṅkameriyak kaṭal malaiyaḷavum valaṅkolāḻi varaiyū
ḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasiṁhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakesaripaṟmarāna tribhuvana ccakravattikaḷ śrīvikkirama coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu nāḷ toṇṇūṟṟu Aiñcināl Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu
ttiraimur nāṭṭut tiraimurt tiraimuruṭaiyāṉ pāṇāmaṉ cikaṇṭatevaneṉ piḷḷaiyār Ātiśaṇḍeśvaradevar śrīhastattile tirunan=tavanappuṟamāka nirvārttuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu vaṭakarai virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu meṟkāl nāṭṭu śrījayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai maṇaṟkuṭik kaṭṭaḷaiyil
kun=tavaivatikkuk kiḻakku Arumoḻiteva vāykkālukku teṟkum pattāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭumāvil kiḻakkaṭaiya mummuṭicoḻacceri makacirai śrīkṛṣṇakkiramavittaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiyenāy Ennutāyirun=tanilam Orumāvum teṟkaṭaiya nittavinotacceri
koṭṭaiyūr vāsutevaṉ pūvattan Uḷḷiṭṭār Aṭṭakantārkkuppaṭṭu kāśyapaṉ Agnitevan keśvapaṭṭak kāṭaka śatāśiva vājapayājiyār pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiyenāy Eṉṉutāyirun=ta nilam Āṟumāvum vānavaṉmātevivatikku kiḻakku Arumoḻi teva vāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu
teṟkaṭaiyak kāppiyaṉ nārāyaṇan kecavaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Aṭṭakattārkku paṭṭa nilam nālumāvil teṟkaṭaiya nilam mākāṇi mun=tirikai nikki Itaṉ vaṭakku kāśyapaṉ nakkaṉ nārāyaṇan pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiyenāy Eṉṉutāy Irun=ta nilam mukkāṇi mun=tirikaiyum Itaṉ vaṭakku meṟpaṭi Aṭṭa
kattārkku paṭṭu koṭṭaiyūr Eḻuvaṉ mātavaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiyenāy Eṉṉutāyirun=ta nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum teṟkaṭaiya meṟpaṭi Aṭṭakattārkku paṭṭu veḷḷāḷaṉ kuppai karumāṇiyāna jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻaveḷāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyenāy Eṉṉutāyirun=ta nilam mākāṇi mun=tiri
kaiyum maṇaṟkuṭi nattattil kuntavaivatikku kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku teṟku Oṉpatāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam Oru māvarai Araikkāṇiyil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam mukkāṇi mun=tirikai nikki Itaṉ meṟku nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi kīḻaraiyil teṟkaṭaiya nilam Araikkāṇik kiḻarai nikki Itaṉ vaṭakku nilam Arai
kkāṇiyil nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl meṟpaṭiyāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiyenāy Eṉnutāyirun=ta nilam muntirikaikkiḻeḻu māvaraiyum Āka nilam pattumā muntirikaik kiḻeḻumāvaraiyum Iṟaiyiḻicci Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku tirumantirapuṣpañ cāttukaikku rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut taniyūr perumpaṟṟappu
liyūr melpiṭākai kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻapperiḷamai nāṭṭup paṇṇaṅkuṭicceriyāna parakecarinallūrppāl śrīcun=taracoḻavatikku meṟku śrīkaṇṭarātittaṉ vāykkālukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcatirattu Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār nilamāy nāṉ ceyvikkiṟa cikaṇṭatevaṉ tiruna
[ntanava]nattukku Ellai tirukkiḷāñceri yeṟappona peruvaḻikku kiḻakkum teṅkaviḷākattukkut teṟkum tirupputiyitūṭṭu viḷākattukku meṟkum kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicain=ta nāṉkellaiyilum Uḷpaṭṭa tirunan=tanavanattukku kuṭikaḷ ceṭiyaṉ Uyyakkoṇṭānāṉa cikaṇṭateva
ṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḷ nālvarkku Āḷ Oṉṟukku puṭavai mutal Uḷpaṭa nellu patakkāka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu Irutūṇiyāka muṟcollappaṭṭa It tirunan=tanavanappuṟamāka nāṉ viṭṭa nilam Anupavittu varicaip pāti An=tarāyam Iṟuttum Ivaṉ vaṟkattārum kuṭikkuṟṟappaṭāmal Ittirunan=ta(na)vanam
ceytu tirumantṛpuṣpam paṟittu Aṭṭakkaṭavarkaḷāka tirunan=tanavaṉappuṟamākak kuṭuttu Ippaṭi cempiluṅ kallilum veṭṭikkoḷvatāka In=ta nilam Enakkuk kāṇiyāka viṟṟa In=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaccaturvetimaṅkalattu māhāsabhaiyār paṇiyāl Ivvūr Ūrkkaṇakku ṉāṉūṟṟuvaṉ kaṭampāṟanāna paṇṭitappārayaṉ Eḻuttu ma
in=ta mahāsabhaiyār Eḻuttum Iṭṭuppukun=ta mahāniyokappaṭiyum tirunan=tanavanapuṟamākakkuṭuttu piḷḷaiyār Ātiśaṇḍeśvaradevar śrīhastattile nirvārttuk kuṭutteṉ Ittiraimuruṭaiyāṉ pāṇāmaṉ cikaṇṭa tevaṉeṉ Ivar colla In=tappiramāṇam Eḻutineṉ virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkai nāṭṭu brahmade
yam Āṟṟūrirukkum Āṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ ciyārur tevaṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu ..ivai tiraimuruṭaiyāṉ pāṇāmaṉ cikaṇṭa tevaṉ Eḻuttu .. Ippaṭikku Ivai tiraimuruṭaiyāṉ pāṇāman tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nittavinota vaḷanāṭṭu Āvūrkkūṟṟattu maṇalūr maṇalūr kiḻavaṉ
pavaḷakkuṉṟu tirumaḻuvāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu mullaikkuṭi mullaikkuṭaiyāṉ kūttaṉ cikuṭaiyāneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu kū Ippaṭi Aṟiven kāśyapan Agnitevaṉ keśvapaṭṭa kāṭakaśakatāśiva vājapayājiyeṉ ..ippaṭi Aṟivom In=ta jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom kāppiyaṉ veṇkāṭu tevaṉ nakkapirāṉ paṭṭaneṉ .— Ālikkoṉṟai sarvvadevapaṭṭaneṉ ..kuravacari tiruppori paṭṭaneṉkū kurovi ciṅkappirāṉ paṭṭaneṉ kurovi kumārapaṭṭaneṉ .—āliccaṉ paṟmanāpaṉ tattaneṉ .—ālikkoṉṟai nārāyaṇapaṭṭaneṉkū makacirai cen=takumāra paṭṭaneṉkū
tūṟpil nittakalliyāṇa paṭṭaneṉkū Ālikkonṟai kovin=tapaṭṭaneṉkū kuravucari kovarttana Akkirama vittaneṉ kū
Digital edition of SII 28.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
